config.respite.title: Respite Configuration
config.respite.enableTimeLapse.tooltip: Sleeping players accelerate time instead of skipping the night.
config.respite.maxTimeLapseRate.tooltip: Fastest time multiplier when every Overworld player sleeps (2–100).
config.respite.timeLapseTickBudgetMs.too: Millisecond budget per server tick for extra world ticks; the rate degrades before the server does (5–45).
config.respite.combatHoldsTime.tooltip: Nearby combat holds the lapse at ×1 until the fight ends.
config.respite.announceTimeLapse.tooltip: Announce rate changes on the action bar of Overworld players.
config.respite.enableRestfulSaturation.t: Saturation heals sleeping players through the night.
config.respite.restfulRequiresFullHunger: Overnight healing only starts on a full hunger bar.
World ticks between overnight heal pulses (100–2400).
config.respite.newMoonHealMultiplier.too: Overnight healing multiplier on new-moon nights (1.0–4.0).
config.respite.enablePhantomRework.toolt: Phantoms guard the heights and the new moon instead of punishing insomnia. Off restores vanilla insomnia.
config.respite.phantomAltitudeMin.toolti: Lowest altitude at which phantoms spawn on ordinary nights (−64–320).
config.respite.phantomNewMoon.tooltip: Phantoms roam at any altitude on new-moon nights.
config.respite.enableWeariness.tooltip: Going too long without sleep wears players down.
config.respite.wearinessThresholdDays.to: Days awake before a player becomes Weary (1–30).
config.respite.wearinessRegenPenalty.too: Fraction of natural regeneration lost while Weary (0.0–0.95).
config.respite.exhaustedThresholdDays.to: Days awake before a player becomes Exhausted (2–60); always at least one day past the Weary threshold.
config.respite.exhaustedRegenPenalty.too: Fraction of natural regeneration lost while Exhausted (0.0–0.95).
config.respite.enableChronometer.tooltip: The time-of-day redstone block. Off removes its recipe; placed blocks keep working.
config.respite.enableCaffeinatedBrew.too: The campfire-steeped brew. Off removes its recipe; held items keep working.
config.respite.brewHasteSeconds.tooltip: Haste duration granted by the brew, in seconds (0–600).
config.respite.showTimeLapseMessages.too: Show the time-lapse action-bar lines on this client.
config.respite.showExhaustionBlink.toolt: Show the Exhausted eyelid blink on this client.
